name: AMD Ryzen 9 9950X3D
description: The AMD Ryzen 9 9950X3D is a flagship 16-core, 32-thread desktop processor that merges heavyweight productivity with top-tier gaming capabilities. It features AMD's 2nd-generation 3D V-Cache technology, offering massive cache capacity to breeze through both extreme gaming sessions and heavy content creation workflows.

name: Intel Core i5-13600K
description: The Intel Core i5-13600K is a highly acclaimed 13th-generation desktop processor. Featuring 14 cores (6 performance, 8 efficiency) and 20 threads, it offers exceptional performance for both gaming and heavy multitasking. It's 'K' designation means it is unlocked for overclocking.

name: Intel Core Ultra 9 285K
description: The Intel Core Ultra 9 285K is Intel's flagship desktop processor (codename Arrow Lake-S). Built on the new LGA 1851 socket and TSMC’s advanced 3nm process, it features 24 cores, reduced power consumption, and a dedicated NPU for AI, making it designed for gaming, content creation, and heavily threaded workloads.
